creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013
New Revision: 310634
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310634

Log:
  - Update to 3.0800
  - Add LICENSE (ART10 and GPLv1)
  - Add new template suuport to options
  - Sort MAN3
  - Remove unnecessary post-patch target
  - Give maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/175364
  Submitted by:	Po-Chien Lin <linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile
  head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:16:54 2013	(r310633)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/Makefile	Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013	(r310634)
@@ -2,61 +2,71 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	CGI-FormBuilder
-PORTVERSION=	3.0501
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0800
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:NWIGER
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION:S,00$,,}
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
 COMMENT=	FormBuilder for CGI
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-OPTIONS_DEFINE=	TT HTML_TEMPLATE TEXT_TEMPLATE CGI_FAST_TEMPLATE
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	TT HTML_TEMPLATE TEXT_TEMPLATE CGI_FAST_TEMPLATE CGI_SSI CGI_SESSION
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	TT
 TT_DESC=	Template Toolkit support
 HTML_TEMPLATE_DESC=	HTML::Template support
 TEXT_TEMPLATE_DESC=	Text::Template support
-CGI_FAST_TEMPLATE_DESC=	CGI::FastTemplate suppor
+CGI_FAST_TEMPLATE_DESC=	CGI::FastTemplate support
+CGI_SSI_DESC=	CGI::SSI support
+CGI_SESSION_DESC=	CGI::Session support
 
 MAN3=	CGI::FormBuilder.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Field.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Messages.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Multi.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Source.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Source::File.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Template.3 \
 	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Builtin.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::CGI_SSI.3 \
 	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Div.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Fast.3 \
 	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::HTML.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Source::File.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Template.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Multi.3 \
 	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::TT2.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Test.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Util.3 \
 	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Text.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Source.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Field.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Template::Fast.3 \
-	CGI::FormBuilder::Messages.3
-
-post-patch:
-	@${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -name "*.orig" -delete
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Test.3 \
+	CGI::FormBuilder::Util.3
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTT}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Template-Toolkit>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Template-Toolkit>=2.08:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-Template-Toolkit
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MHTML_TEMPLATE}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-HTML-Template>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Template
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-HTML-Template>=2.06:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Template
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTEXT_TEMPLATE}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Text-Template>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Text-Template
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-Text-Template>=1.43:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-Text-Template
 .endif
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MCGI_FAST_TEMPLATE}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-CGI-FastTemplate>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-FastTemplate
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-CGI-FastTemplate>=1.09:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-FastTemplate
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MCGI_SSI}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-CGI-SSI>=0.92:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-SSI
+.endif
+
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MCGI_SESSION}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	p5-CGI-Session>=3.95:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Session
 .endif
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo	Sat Jan 19 03:16:54 2013	(r310633)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-FormBuilder/distinfo	Sat Jan 19 03:26:00 2013	(r310634)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (CGI-FormBuilder-3.0501.tgz) = 45e84b1f39730874b19f5982294abaa335bc7bb43b35a24943b809ea627f3a0c
-SIZE (CGI-FormBuilder-3.0501.tgz) = 167585
+SHA256 (CGI-FormBuilder-3.08.tgz) = f7af79df9af541d1ed12dc41a8d3e61b9a1037710308bd29213020d4e3ab074c
+SIZE (CGI-FormBuilder-3.08.tgz) = 155393

==============================================================================

@@ -20,4 +20,4 @@ Its main features are:
 
 Plus, the native HTML generated is valid XHTML 1.0 Transitional.
 
-WWW: http://www.formbuilder.org
+WWW: http://www.formbuilder.org/

@@ -39,6 +50,7 @@

 %%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Template/Builtin.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/CGI/FormBuilder/Template/CGI_SSI.pm
